content.en:
Another period of time has passed, and this trace of extradimensional rules has completely dissipated.

"Go find other traces of extradimensional rules!"

Ye Tian decided.

However, he also knew very well that almost all of those traces of extradimensional rules were occupied, and if he wanted to comprehend the traces of other extradimensional rules, he would have to fight for the killing, so that he could hope to comprehend the traces of other extradimensional rules.

Moreover, many traces of extradimensional rules are estimated to have dissipated, and there are not many traces of extradimensional rules that still exist.

In fact, many half-step extradimensional realms have no traces of extradimensional rules at this time, and they are also looking for other traces of extradimensional rules.

Thundered!!!!

Killing fluctuations were heard in the distance.

Ye Tian cautiously walked over to avoid touching the power of the third realm transcendent realm.

Soon, he rushed to the place of battle.

I saw that there was just a trace of extradimensional rules there, which was several times larger than the traces of extradimensional rules that Ye Tian had comprehended before, but there were also more half-step superdimensional realms here.

Dozens of half-step extradimensional realms have taken over here, while other half-step extradimensional realms are invading here.

"These dozens of half-step extradimensional realms should be a force that occupies the traces of this extradimensional rule. "

Ye Tian didn't do it immediately, but waited.

It didn't take long for the battle to reach a certain level, and he immediately took action.

Boom!243!!

Ye Tian erupted with extra-dimensional power and extra-dimensional body, and performed a super-dimensional technique.

Moreover, he also urged a dense array of super-dimensional secret treasures, and the lowest were high-level super-dimensional secret treasures.

He was already very wealthy, so he had been refining a piece of high-grade super-dimensional secret treasures all these years, that is, the materials needed for super-high-level super-dimensional secret treasures were relatively rare, so he did not refine a large number of them, but he also refined a lot.

It can be said that with so many super secret treasure blessings, his strength has improved a lot.

Under a single blow, many half-step extradimensional realms were severely damaged.

However, these half-step extradimensional realms are all very top-notch, and they all have life-saving hole cards, so Ye Tian didn't kill any of them.

Whew!!!

A half-step transcendent realm's gaze looked at Ye Tian, and he no longer fought and killed, and his eyes were full of fear.

After all, Ye Tian's strength was too strong, and none of them were opponents, unless they all joined forces.

"Let's comprehend this trace of extradimensional rules, how about it?"

Ye Tian proposed.

"We agree, but they don't necessarily agree. A half-step extradimensional realm said.

Those dozens of half-step extradimensional realm people who occupied the traces of this extradimensional rule were very unwilling, they had already occupied this place, they had always been here, but as a result, these half-step extradimensional realm powerhouses came to snatch it, it was strange that they could agree.

But the current situation is that they are in a weak position, if they don't agree, continue to kill, they may have to fall into some half-step extradimensional realm, then it is not worth it.

"We agree!"

They had no choice but to give up their territory and let them also come in and comprehend this trace of extradimensional rules.

Therefore, these half-step extradimensional realms each occupy a small area, surrounding this trace of extradimensional rules, to comprehend it.

Ye Tian also sat cross-legged and began to comprehend this trace of extradimensional rules.

And this realization, another extradimensional era has passed.

Many half-step extradimensional realms have gained something, and then they have left.

In the following days, Ye Tian was still looking for traces of extradimensional rules, but it was difficult to find them, but he encountered several dangers, and once even let the copy body touch a trace of the power of the third transcendent realm, thus being wiped out.

And after these years of exploration, Ye Tian found a very strange thing, that is, many extra-dimensional realms did not go to the traces of extra-dimensional rules, and seemed to be looking for something.

He had seen many times the extradimensional realms shuttling around the Annihilation Land of the Seven Thousand and One Realm, and their wills frantically explored the surrounding area, seemingly exploring every inch of the void.

Obviously, this is definitely looking for something. []

"Could it be that there is any (cacj) treasure here?"

Ye Tian couldn't guess it, but Peeping Heaven Pavilion should be clear, maybe he could buy this kind of information from Peeping Heavenly Pavilion.

this day.

He came to the Sky Pavilion again to buy this information.

The Sky Pavilion did know this information, but it was very expensive, and it would take a billion Gala Treasure Coins to buy it.

A mere piece of intelligence worth one billion Gala Treasure Coins, in exchange for other half-step extradimensional realms, will definitely not buy them, and many poor half-step extradimensional realms can't even take out a billion gala treasure coins!

However, Ye Tian directly purchased this information.

Subsequently, Peeping Heaven Pavilion gave Ye Tian a detailed piece of information, but asked Ye Tian to make an oath not to pass on the information, otherwise Peeping Heaven Pavilion would not be able to continue to sell this information.

After obtaining the information, Ye Tiancai finally knew why those extradimensional realms were looking there.

Treasure!

It is indeed a treasure that exists, and it is also a treasure that makes those extradimensional realms crazy.

Extradimensional Boundary Stone Fragments!

The Extra-Dimensional Realm Boundary Stone is the treasure that the two third realm transcendent realms have killed for this, and it is said that the extra-dimensional realm boundary stones help the third realm exist and strengthen the extra-dimensional realm in the body.

In other words, the Extradimensional Realm Boundary Stone can increase the strength of the Third Extradimensional Realm.

One can imagine how expensive such a treasure is.

And in order to snatch the Transcendental Boundary Stones, the two Extradimensional Realms of the Third Realm not only destroyed the Seven Thousand and One Territory during the battle, but even smashed many Extradimensional Realm Boundary Stones.

Of course.

Nine out of nine of the extra-dimensional realm boundary stones must have been snatched away by these two super-dimensional realm powerhouses of the third realm, and the rest is estimated to be a trace of super-dimensional realm boundary stone fragments.

But no matter how small the fragment of the Extradimensional Realm Boundary Stone is, it is an unimaginable treasure for the powerhouse of the Transcendent Realm of the first realm, even if it is not needed for itself, it can be sold, and its value is unimaginable.

Even a fragment of the Extradimensional Realm Boundary Stone the size of a thumb cover was enough to make the first Extradimensional Realm go on a killing spree.

The point is that the Extradimensional Boundary Stone is difficult to perceive and difficult to identify, as if it is an ordinary stone fragment, if it is in normal times, it is not recognizable at all.

But now that the Seven Thousand and One Territory has been annihilated, and a lot of matter has been annihilated, if there are still stone fragments appearing, it must not be ordinary things, and there is still a probability that it is a fragment of the boundary stone of the extradimensional domain.

From the shattering of the 7001 territory to the present, dozens of fragments have been discovered, but it has not caused any major battles, after all, once it is found, they will immediately flee and leave the 7001 territory.

Even if other extradimensional realms knew about it, it would be too late to track it.

Therefore, Ye Tiancai did not find the killing between the extradimensional realms.
